user_query:
We're a DTC skincare brand planning Q3 growth on Facebook/Instagram. Please read all the inputs under input/ and build a practical Meta Ads plan that we can hand to our media buyer. Your deliverables must follow the campaign → ad set → ad structure and reflect best practices for Advantage+ (where appropriate), dynamic product ads, lookalikes built from high-LTV customers, retargeting with proper exclusions, creative testing, and tracking via Pixel + Conversions API.

Inputs to read:
- input/account_overview.json (brand context, monthly budget range, geos)
- input/past_performance.json (last 60 days campaigns, ROAS, CPA, CTR, frequency, spend)
- input/product_catalog.csv (product names, prices, margins, category flags)
- input/website_events.json (events implemented, volumes, any gaps)
- input/creative_inventory.md (what assets we have available today)

Please produce all of the following files and write them to the exact paths:
1) output/META_campaign_plan.json — A structured plan with: account info; at least 2 campaigns (prospecting and retargeting), each with a clear objective; budget_type (CBO or ABO) and budget amounts; at least one Advantage+ or Dynamic Ads usage; per-campaign naming; per-ad set audience_type (lookalike, interest, advantage_plus, retargeting), placements, frequency_cap (<=3), exclusions including recent converters with a day window; 3–5 creative_variants per ad set; and a brief note on learning-phase targets.
2) output/META_audience_definitions.json — JSON definitions for audiences (lookalikes based on high-LTV customers, interest stacks, retargeting windows with exclusions). Include a lookalike built from high-LTV customers at 1%.
3) output/META_naming_examples.csv — At least 3 example names using the format META_[Objective]_[Audience]_[Offer]_[Date] with columns: name,objective,audience,offer,date.
4) output/META_creative_briefs.md — Three concise briefs (each with Hook, Problem, Solution, CTA) tailored to our products and placements (Feed, Stories, Reels). Keep each brief 150–250 words.
5) output/META_tracking_checklist.md — A pre-launch checklist confirming Meta Pixel and Conversions API, event mapping for conversion optimization, and a quick QA list.

Assumptions are fine if any inputs are incomplete, but be explicit about them in the plan JSON under a top-level key called "assumptions". Stay pragmatic and make sure the plan is immediately executable in Ads Manager.
